description: Letter from Abū Manṣūr to [al-Shaykh] al-Makīn al-Ṣayrafī, in Qūṣ (here called "thaghr Qūṣ"). In Arabic script, elegantly written. The sender opens with respectful greetings and wishes to be reunited. He says that when he left Qūṣ. . . and went out onto the 'baḥr' (probably the Nile here), then mentions "in Fustat" and "al-Rayyis Dāʾūd" and "al-Rayyis Abū l-Bahā." The last line seems to refer to (someone's brother?) Abū l-Najm who is in either the army (al-jaysh) or prison (al-ḥabs). (This document may relate to the cluster of letters from Manṣūr b. Sālim, frantic about his son Abū l-Najm who ran off from home and spent time in the army and at one point was rumored to be traveling to Qūṣ.) ASE
description_he: מכתב מאבו מנצור ל[אל-שייח'] אל-מכין אל-צירפי, בקוס; כתב ערבי אלגנטי; פתיחה בברכות מכובדות; מזכיר פוסטאט, אל-ראיס דאוד ואל-ראיס אבו אל-בהא; השורה האחרונה מזכירה אבו אל-נג'ם שנמצא בצבא או בכלא
